title: Monday AI community Event (AEST & EU time zone)
excerpt:
To make sure that community members from all over the world are able to connect and participate in our community events, we have added another time zone for our LIVE AI Event! 
Join our team on June 1st at 9am CEST/ 5pm. …

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
To make sure that community members from all over the world are able to connect and participate in our community events, we have added another time zone for our LIVE AI Event!

Join our team on June 1st at 9am CEST/ 5pm.

This event is unique opportunity to hear directly from product managers and will not be recorded.

Please note, if you are unable to make this time, we will be having the same event later in the day at at 5pm CEST/ 11am EST.

The power of monday AI (1)1920×1920 114 KB

posts.author: pamela.carlin (MrsFrink)
posts.cookedHtml: I got an email this morning saying this event was rescheduled until June 21st. Is that true?

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! No the event has not been rescheduled. Maybe the email you have is for another event?!
